title: Library of Congress Immigration Challenges Primary Sources
description: A LOC source card for primary sources about immigration and new Americans.
license: Library of Congress / item-level rights vary

pages.text: The Library of Congress immigration challenges source set uses historical materials to explore arrival, adaptation, work, community, discrimination, and belonging.
Use this source for students practicing empathy and evidence-based historical interpretation from documents, images, and personal accounts.
Library of Congress source sets include public-domain and rights-unknown primary sources. Use the item pages to confirm rights before mirroring individual documents.
